first_run.rationale: The evaluations are nearly identical in substance. Both give the same score (3/10) and cite the same fundamental, job-relevant reasons for the low rating: the candidate's experience is in web technologies (TypeScript, Node.js), while the role requires deep, specialized expertise in C++ and industrial automation protocols, which the candidate lacks. The minor differences in wording and the specific examples cited are well within the scope of ordinary run-to-run variation and show no connection to the change in location from Berlin to San Francisco.
